title: Unit tests for Signal API
acceptance_criteria: Tests for key generation: unique, hashed storage, correct format
Tests for signals endpoint: Free tier delay/filtering, Pro tier full data, Enterprise reasoning
Tests for tier-based rate limiting: each tier enforced correctly
Tests for webhook HMAC signature generation
Tests for Stripe webhook handlers: checkout completed, subscription updated/deleted
Tests for usage tracking: Redis increment, limit enforcement
All tests use mocks (no live Stripe/Redis needed)
pytest passes: cd trading && python -m pytest tests/unit/test_signals_api.py -v --tb=short --timeout=30
